headline: Evercore ISI Lowers its Price Target on GoDaddy Inc. (GDDY) to $95 and Maintains an In Line Rating
summary: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 26, 2026, Evercore ISI lowered its price target on GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY) to $95 from $145 and maintained an In Line rating. The same day, Citi reduced its price target to $110 from $195 and kept a Buy […]
